title: I add the Crab to Minecraft
description: datapack that add the Crab to Minecraft
body:
A video showing the data pack: https://youtu.be/ppfzhSp3jqc


*The Crab spawn for every 2 frogs in the Mangrove swamp biome


*When you put The Crab Claw in your off hand you get more 3 block building reach
